nasb.text: I will also tear off your veils and deliver My people from your hands, and they will no longer be in your hands to be hunted; and you will know that I am the Lord.

esv.text: Your veils also I will tear off and deliver my people out of your hand, and they shall be no more in your hand as prey, and you shall know that I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 我必扯下你們的頭巾，救我的子民脫離你們的手，使他們不再被你們的手獵取；你們就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 我还要撕去你们的头巾，把我的子民从你们手中拯救出来，使他们不再做你们手中的猎物。这样，你们就知道我是耶和华。
